prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年综合类最低位次分别为约3794名→3650名→3741名→3998名→4649名，整体呈后移趋势，近3年累计后移约900名；2025年基准位次约4649名，较2024年下降约650名，后移幅度明显；该校在上海市综合类招生计划2021–2023年均为6人，2024年增至8人，2025年增至10人；2026年计划大幅缩减至5人，较2025年缩招50%，为近年最大幅度调整，缩招将显著降低竞争压力，使位次前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中南大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第27名，近年排名稳定在23–27名区间，属于国内顶尖高校梯队；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及原校长张尧学被查事件，对学校学术声誉有一定影响；抖音综合热度排名第85位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度中等偏低；2024–2025年均有录取断档相关舆情，可能对考生报考心理产生一定抑制；第五轮学科评估中，冶金工程、护理学获评A+，材料科学与工程获评A，临床医学、计算机科学与技术、土木工程等10个学科获评A-，A类学科总数达13个，学科实力雄厚；临床医学为该校在上海招生的核心专业，学科评估A-，社会热度高热推荐。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业2024–2025年社会热度持续高热推荐，报考意愿强烈；上海2026年高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增加约35.4%，竞争环境显著加剧；中南大学位于湖南省长沙市，非上海本地高校，在上海招生规模较小（近年6–10人），本地无招生占比优势；上海考生对省外985高校的报考意愿受地域偏好影响，但中南大学作为顶尖985仍具较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4649名、2026年招生计划大幅缩招50%（使位次前移）、上海考生总数大幅增加35.4%（使竞争加剧）、声誉偏负面及临床医学专业高热等多重因素，结合考生大增和声誉影响做有限修正后，预测2026年综合类最低位次约3304名，区间2833–3775名。缩招是推动位次前移的最关键因素，考生大增是主要抵消力量。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（新材料类大飞机智慧创新班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3: 暂无（该校在上海综合类仅设2个招生专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约3304名，区间2833–3775名。位次在区间上限附近建议以二档工科试验班为主、一档临床医学八年制冲刺；位次在区间下限附近可重点冲刺一档临床医学八年制。临床医学八年制学科实力强、社会热度高，但竞争激烈；工科试验班依托材料A学科且专业任选，适合对工科感兴趣的考生作为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for comprehensive category were approximately 3794 → 3650 → 3741 → 3998 → 4649, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 900 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4649, a decrease of about 650 places compared to 2024, with a significant backward shift; the enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Shanghai was 6 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 8 in 2024, and to 10 in 2025; the 2026 plan is sharply reduced to 5 students, a 50% reduction compared to 2025, the largest adjustment in recent years, which will significantly reduce competition pressure and cause rankings to move forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Central South University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 27th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 23–27 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the investigation of former president Zhang Yaoxue, which has a certain impact on the academic reputation; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 85th, rated as average, with moderately low exposure on short video platforms; there were related public opinions about admission gaps in 2024–2025, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on candidates' application psychology; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Metallurgical Engineering and Nursing were rated A+, Materials Science and Engineering was rated A, and 10 disciplines including Clinical Medicine, Computer Science and Technology, and Civil Engineering were rated A-, with a total of 13 A-class disciplines, showing strong disciplinary strength; Clinical Medicine is the core major for enrollment in Shanghai, with a discipline evaluation of A-, and is highly recommended with high social heat.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine major has maintained high social heat and strong application willingness from 2024 to 2025; the total number of Shanghai college entrance examination candidates in 2026 is about 66,700, an increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025, significantly intensifying the competitive environment; Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan Province, not a local university in Shanghai, with a small enrollment scale in Shanghai (6–10 students in recent years), and no local enrollment proportion advantage; Shanghai candidates' willingness to apply for 985 universities outside the province is influenced by regional preferences, but Central South University, as a top 985, still has strong appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors including the 2025 baseline ranking of 4649, the sharp 50% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (causing rankings to move forward), the significant 35.4% increase in Shanghai candidates (intensifying competition), negative reputation, and high heat of Clinical Medicine, with limited corrections for the increase in candidates and reputation impact, the predicted minimum ranking for the comprehensive category in 2026 is about 3304, with a range of 2833–3775. The enrollment reduction is the most critical factor driving the forward shift in rankings, while the increase in candidates is the main counterbalancing force.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (New Materials Large Aircraft Smart Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3: None (The university only offers 2 enrollment majors in Shanghai's comprehensive category).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 3304, with a range of 2833–3775. Candidates near the upper limit of the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Class as the main choice, with Tier 1 Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program as a reach; candidates near the lower limit can focus on reaching for Tier 1 Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program. Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program has strong disciplinary strength and high social heat but is highly competitive; the Engineering Experimental Class relies on the A-rated Materials discipline and offers free major selection, making it a safe choice for candidates interested in engineering.
